    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.args(String... args)
    Specifies the command-line arguments passed into the Java command.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.args(Args args)
    Specifies the command-line arguments passed into the Java command.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.beanStore(WritableBeanStore beanStore)
    Specifies an external WritableBeanStore to use instead of constructing a fresh one.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.config(Config config)
    Specifies the config for initializing this microservice.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.configName(String configName)
    Specifies the config name for initializing this microservice.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.configStore(ConfigStore configStore)
    Specifies the config store to use for storing and retrieving configurations.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.configurations(Class<?>... configurations)
    Registers one or more @Configuration-annotated classes whose @Bean methods/fields will be processed during microservice bootstrap.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.configurations(List<Class<?>> configurations)
    Registers one or more @Configuration-annotated classes.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.console(Scanner consoleReader, PrintWriter consoleWriter)
    Specifies the console input and output.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.consoleCommands(Class<? extends ConsoleCommand>... consoleCommands)
    Specifies console commands to make available on the Java console.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.consoleCommands(ConsoleCommand... consoleCommands)
    Specifies console commands to make available on the Java console.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.consoleEnabled(boolean consoleEnabled)
    Specifies that the Java console is enabled for this microservice.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.copy()
    Creates a copy of this builder.
    static Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.create()
    Creates a new builder for this object.
    static Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.create(BeanStore beanStore)
    Creates a new builder for this object using the supplied BeanStore for @Value-resolution and dependency injection.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.listener(MicroserviceListener listener)
    Registers an event listener for this microservice.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.logConfig(LogConfig logConfig)
    Specifies logging instructions for the microservice.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.logger(Logger logger)
    Specifies the logger used by the microservice and returned by the Microservice.getLogger() method.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.manifest(Object value)
    Specifies the manifest file of the jar file this microservice is contained within.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.overridingBeanStore(BeanStore store)
    Installs the supplied BeanStore as the overridingParent of this microservice's bean store.
    <T> Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.varBean(Class<T> c, T value)
    Adds a bean for vars defined in the var resolver.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.vars(Class<? extends Var>... vars)
    Augments the set of variables defined in the configuration and var resolver.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.workingDir(File workingDir)
    Specifies the directory to use to resolve the config file and other paths defined with the config file.
    Microservice.Builder
    Microservice.Builder.workingDir(String workingDir)
    Specifies the directory to use to resolve the config file and other paths defined with the config file.
